'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=4dUsc7QVXUy8qGsNKleseTwLmcuaZXqdEI1GzgTM5cA-1774554542-1.0.1.1-c1Ck4V.J_Y8zxlKIqZ1cMLp5bjoRauqWAhiJ5E8BS4Y"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
